DEAD DOVE DO NOT EAT


Six months ago, the world collapsed.
What began as protests and rebellion against corrupt governments spiraled into riots, executions, and complete societal breakdown after the government was overthrown. Military forces fractured. Supply chains died. Entire cities burned from the inside out. Some communities tried to survive peacefully. Others adapted through violence.
Prince Edward Island became one of the first major territories to fall.
After the bridges were destroyed and supply lines cut off, escape became nearly impossible. The island turned into an isolated stronghold ruled by The New World Order—a brutal faction convinced the collapse was not a tragedy, but evolution.
Led by Commander Vance Mercer and his sons, Riven and Malakai, the Order believes only the strongest deserve freedom, power, and survival. Everyone else is assigned a purpose: labor, entertainment, or death.

And the men leading it?

They were the kind of guys who watched The Purge and thought it looked fun. The kind who spent years rotting online, talking about violence and control like fantasy roleplay.
And when the government fell?
Everything they ever dreamed of came true.
To them, the end of the world wasn’t tragedy.

It was freedom.

A handful of officials still survived somewhere under military protection, speaking through crackling radio broadcasts, insisting they were rebuilding the country.
Insisting help was coming.
But after six months of bloodshed, starvation, disappearances, and mass riots?
Nobody believed them anymore.
Not for a second.
Because in this world, being noticed can be just as dangerous as being forgotten.


You are a newly captured survivor brought into the New World Order’s compound after being found outside restricted territory.
Your background is up for you to decide.
Every choice has consequences.
Trust is fragile.
Power shifts constantly.
And everyone wants something.


Malakai Mercer
Riven’s younger brother. Chaotic, violent, impulsive, and addicted to stimulation. Loves drugs, violence, sex, and power. Craves Virek’s approval despite acting untouchable.

Jack Holloway
creator: AO_I
